title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at FabAlley

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at FabAlley
jsonLd.description:
FabAlley invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabAlley:
FabAlley is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley!
